channel.title: 庄湛 @zwebrain on zwebrain

item.title: 庄湛 @zwebrain
item.description: [Email] [QQ] [WeChat] [Birthday] 11811721 [at] mail.sustech.edu.cn 1173105448 meta-learner 05.16, 11.20 😃 Brief Biography I am Zhan Zhuang, currently BEng at the Department of Computer Science and Engineering of SUSTech, supervised by Professor Xuan Song. I am going to study for my doctorate in the collaborative program of SUSTech and City University of Hong Kong under the dual supervision of Yu Zhang and Ying Wei.
